stories.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
stories.summary: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.

stories.summary: Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.

We also post a weekly calendar of upcoming robotics events for the next few months. Please send us your events for inclusion. ICRA 2026 : 1–5 June 2026, VIENNA RSS 2026 : 13–17 July

stories.title: This Roboticist-Turned-Teacher Built a Life-Size Replica of ENIAC
stories.summary: Tom Burick has always considered himself a builder. Over the years he’s designed robots, constructed a vintage teardrop trailer , and most recently, led a group of students in building a full-scale replica of a pivotal 1940s computer. Burick is a technology instructor at PS Academy in Gilbert, Ariz.

stories.title: Flex and Teradyne expand partnership to scale physical AI
stories.summary: Flex and Teradyne Robotics expanded their partnership to accelerate physical AI across global manufacturing facilities. The post Flex and Teradyne expand partnership to scale physical AI appeared first on The Robot Report .

stories.title: Apptronik’s new CPO hire a major step in right direction
stories.summary: Apptronik taps Waymo veteran Daniel Chu as CPO to lead its $935M transition from humanoid R&D to mass-market commercialization. The post Apptronik’s new CPO hire a major step in right direction appeared first on The Robot Report .

stories.title: micro-ROS public infrastructure transition
stories.summary: As part of an OSRA-led clarification of governance boundaries within the ROS ecosystem , the public infrastructure of micro-ROS is transitioning to the Vulcanexus ecosystem. stories.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are going to court over OpenAI’s future
stories.summary: After a yearslong legal feud, Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman are heading to trial this week in Northern California in a case that could have sweeping consequences. stories.title: Claude Code costs up to $200 a month. Goose does the same thing for free.

stories.title: AGI Is Not Multimodal
